title: PerfPlusMob
description: PerfPlusMob brings performance boosts and essential QoL tweaks to Minecraft for Pojavlauncher players.
body:
# PerfPlusMob: A Performance + QoL Modpack for PojavLauncher (Mobile)

**PerfPlusMob** is a lightweight Fabric modpackmade specifically for **PojavLauncher users on Android**. It focuses on enhancing **performance** and adding **quality-of-life (QoL)** features to deliver a smoother, cleaner Minecraft experience on low-end and mid-range mobile devices.

> ⚠️ **Important:** This modpack has been tested and confirmed to work **only with the LTW renderer** in PojavLauncher. Using other renderers such as **GL4ES** or **VirGL** may cause crashes or graphical issues.

### 💡 Features:
- Optimized for **mobile gameplay** via PojavLauncher
- Lightweight mod selection for **smooth performance**
- QoL improvements that enhance usability without bloating the game
- Supports **Fabric mod loader** via Modrinth’s manifest system

---

## 🛠️ Included Mods

### ⚡ Performance
- Sodium  
- Iris Shaders  
- Entity Culling  
- FerriteCore  
- Lithium  
- ImmediatelyFast  
- Sodium Extra  
- ModernFix  
- Indium  
- Dynamic FPS  
- More Culling  
- Krypton  
- Enhanced Block Entities  
- Debugify  
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine  
- Noisium  
- BadOptimizations                                                                                                                                
- Very Many Players                                                                                                                              
- ScalableLux                                                                                                                                          

### 🧰 Quality of Life
- Xaero's Minimap  
- Xaero's World Map  
- Xaero Zoomout  
- Reese's Sodium Options  
- AppleSkin  
- Zoomify  
- Model Gap Fix  
- Mouse Tweaks  
- Clean F3  
- Shulker Box Tooltip  
- Better Advancements  
- Better Ping Display  
- Client Tweaks  
- Gamma Utils  
- Detail Armor Bar  
- Status Effect Bars  
- ViaFabricPlus  
- In-Game Account Switcher  
- Accurate Block Placement Reborn  
- Armor HUD  
- Auto Sprint Fix             
- Visible Toggle Sprint                                                                                                                     

### 🎮 Resource Pack
- Vanilla Tweaks

---

Enjoy smoother Minecraft on mobile — optimized, stable, and enhanced.
